description: List or search Sentry issues for an organization. Uses Sentry issue search syntax in `query` (default unresolved). Returns live error groups with metadata; use issue_read or list_issue_events for stack traces.

query.description: Sentry issue search query (e.g. is:unresolved, level:error, assigned:me). Omit for default is:unresolved; pass empty string for no filter.

stats_period.description: Relative time window for stats, e.g. 24h, 14d, 7d.

project.description: Project IDs to filter by. Use -1 for all projects.

sort.description: Sort order: date, freq, inbox, new, recommended, trends, or user.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a prior response Link header or cursor field.
